completed_tasks.name: Phase 2 complete — JiraSyncService, NoProjectPage, DashboardPage Sync UI, UAT 4/4
discuss-phase 3 — decisions captured (Recharts, pie charts, card grid, remove bug table)
ui-phase 3 — initial UI-SPEC based on discuss decisions
UI-SPEC + CONTEXT rewritten to match dashboard.html mockup exactly (approved 6/6)

remaining_tasks.name: plan-phase 3 — spawn gsd-planner + gsd-plan-checker, create PLAN.md files

blockers.description: backend/.env contains secrets — must never be committed
blockers.workaround: File is gitignored; stage only specific files

decisions.decision: Atlassian OAuth 2.0 (3LO) over Basic Auth modal
decisions.rationale: Required for future API access + better UX

decisions.decision: Token encrypted with Fernet at rest in SQLite oauth_tokens table
Dashboard shows only Bug and Bug Task issues — no subtasks
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested: display Bug/Bug Task only, no child tickets

decisions.decision: Jira Cloud API pagination via nextPageToken cursor, not startAt offset
decisions.rationale: POST /search/jql returns HTTP 400 on startAt; only nextPageToken supported.

decisions.decision: No Recharts — Phase 3 has no pie charts
decisions.rationale: UI redesigned mid-session to match dashboard.html which has no charts at all

decisions.decision: Per-card inline stats: OPEN BUGS + CRITICAL counts from GET /api/bugs/{project_key}
decisions.rationale: Matches dashboard.html design — each card fetches its own stats in parallel on mount

decisions.decision: Colored left bar: red (#dc2626) if critical > 0, green (#065b41) if critical = 0
Remove bug table from DashboardPage; keep Sync button + last-synced timestamp
decisions.rationale: Phase 3 replaces raw table with card grid

decisions.decision: Add New Project connect section at page bottom — POST /api/sync/{project_key}
decisions.rationale: Matches dashboard.html Add New Project panel design
CSS Modules pattern; all new styles go here

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 3 — UI-SPEC approved, CONTEXT.md ready. Use --skip-research (config: research disabled). Primary reference: UI/html/dashboard.html + UI/css/dashboard.css.
context_notes: Phase 3 was redesigned mid-session: original discuss-phase decisions (Recharts pie charts, click-to-select project cards with charts below) were replaced to match the static HTML mockup at UI/html/dashboard.html. Both CONTEXT.md and UI-SPEC.md now reflect the dashboard.html design (project card grid with inline OPEN BUGS + CRITICAL stats per card, colored left bar, Add New Project connect section at bottom, no charts). UI-SPEC passed all 6 checker dimensions after 2 iteration cycles. Ready to plan and execute.
